form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 3rd of 11 at this track on March 27 over 1800m, 1.5 len behind The Parent carrying 62kg at $2.90. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Catterick on April 9 over 1413m, 3.5 len behind Monsieur Fudge carrying 58kg at $4. Fitter again and a winning hope.
